title: App Settings - General - Notifications & Device Alerts - Tab UI
scenario: Notifications & Device Alerts tab UI under General settings does not match Figma design
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Tap the Menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to the Home screen.
Tap on the Notifications tab (or Notifications & Device Alerts).
Observe the menu items, layout, icons, toggles, and text displayed on the Notifications & Device Alerts screen.
Compare the observed UI elements against the approved Figma design for the Notifications & Device Alerts screen.
expected: The Notifications & Device Alerts screen UI matches the Figma design exactly, including all menu items, icons, toggle switches, text labels, and layout.
